hooks.prompt: A `gh pr create` command is about to run — this is the final quality gate before a PR is raised. Read the checklist at $HOME/.claude/agents/pr-gatekeeper.md (e.g. via Bash: cat "$HOME/.claude/agents/pr-gatekeeper.md") and follow it exactly, in order: (1) build/compile check, (2) full test suite (not just diff-touching tests, and flag suspiciously skipped/disabled tests), (3) lint and typecheck, (4) coding standards against CLAUDE.md and any .claude/rules/*.md for the paths touched, (5) sensitive-file check (nothing matching .env, .env.*, *.pem, *.key, *credentials*, *secret*, or config/secrets/ may be staged), (6) a full diff self-review for leftover debug statements, commented-out blocks, hardcoded test data, and empty catch blocks. Use Bash to actually run the project's real build/test/lint commands — never report a result you did not actually observe. If every step passes, respond with exactly this JSON and nothing else: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "allow"}}. If anything fails, respond with exactly this JSON and nothing else, filling in precisely what failed and how to fix it: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "<specifics>"}}.
hooks.statusMessage: Running pr-gatekeeper checks before raising PR...
